subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-28 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Though the independence of Perisa has been cast to the wind, yet does it continue to progress with every passing day
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر چند استقلال ایران را بباد دادند ولی ایران روز بروز رو بترقی است نا امید نباید بود
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @predictions and prophecies, @consolation and comfort, @law of transformation and change
